nasb.text: These are the sons of Ishmael and these are their names, by their villages, and by their camps; twelve princes according to their tribes.

esv.text: These are the sons of Ishmael and these are their names, by their villages and by their encampments, twelve princes according to their tribes.

cnv.text: 這些都是以實瑪利的兒子。他們的村莊和營地都按著他們的名字命名；他們作了十二族的族長。

ccb.text: 他这十二个儿子后来分别成了十二个族的族长，各有自己的村庄和营寨。

csbs.text: 这些是以实玛利的儿子，他们的名字就成了自己村庄和营寨的名字，他们也成了十二个部族的族长。
